README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: I am a full-stack (with a focus on front-end) developer, currently looking for new job opportunities. Feel free to contact me!

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: 💬 Join [WeChat/QQ Group](https://github.com/codexu/note-gen/discussions/110), [Discord](https://discord.gg/SXyVZGpbpk), [Telegram](https://t.me/notegen)

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: NoteGen is a cross-platform `Markdown` note-taking application dedicated to using AI to bridge recording and writing, organizing fragmented knowledge into a readable note.

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - 🚀 Lightweight (25MB), free, no ads. - 🌐 Cross-platform support. - 🆓 Free AI and sync solutions. - 📦 Out-of-the-box RAG support. - 🔌 MCP support for AI tool integration. - 🤖 Intelligent agents for automated note processing. - ✍️ Quick note-taking for fragmented information. - 📝 Native Markdown storage format.

evidence.title: note-gen-v0.27.0
evidence.excerpt: - fix(agent): 修复分析模式、确认与 skill 执行相关问题 (#984) - feat(mobile): 优化文件管理器文件控制手势 - feat(mobile): 优化记录编辑和交互 - feat(mobile): 重构记录页交互 - feat(mobile): 优化全局搜索入口与移动端搜索面板体验 - feat(mobile): 优化快捷记录组件并新增一键新建写作文件 - feat(mobile): 优化移动端文件列表二级信息与远程状态展示 - feat(mobile): 增加对话 header，增加对话记录控制 - pref: 对话更平滑的流式输出 - fix(agent): 优化工具调用稳定性、skills 运行时 (#983) - fix(#982): 修复整理笔记弹窗回车事件监听，导致编辑无法正常换行

evidence.title: note-gen-v0.26.5
evidence.excerpt: - feat: Markdown 编辑器支持搜索和替换 (#963) - feat(#968): 本地路径的 md 链接会直接打开文件而不是跳转到浏览器 - feat: Markdown 编辑器支持本地相对路径图片 (#972) - pref: 上传图床增加文字提示 - fix: 修复记录与配置同步问题 (#975) - fix: 修复 S3、WebDAV 无法文件夹同步的问题 - fix: 修复子文件夹下的图片未能使用相对路径的问题 - fix: 修复 bubble-menu 无法使用问题 - fix(#966): 修复大纲未同步更新和点击跳转问题 - fix: 修复编辑器高频输入时光标跳动问题 (#971) - fix(#967): 修复 table 中会默认值 &nbsp (#970)

evidence.title: note-gen-v0.26.4
evidence.excerpt: - feat(#428): 同步方案支持 S3、WebDAV，移除了备用备份方案 (#954) - pref: 优化整理笔记功能，生成时可切换其他笔记，支持终止 - pref: 删除同步文件时显示loading状态 - fix: 修复文件夹同步功能 - fix: 点击文件夹折叠箭头时只触发展开折叠 - fix: 修复居中视图，浮动工具栏位置计算错误 - fix: 修复 Markdown 编辑器工具栏初始化就展示出来的问题
